canonical_definition: Benchmark consisting of linguistic puzzles from the United Kingdom Linguistics Olympiad (UKLO), covering six topics: phonology, morphology, syntax, semantics, number systems, and compounding, used to evaluate LLM performance on puzzle solving.
papers: ECODecoding: Entropy-Based Control for Controllability and Fluency in Controllable Dialogue Generation
GCML: Gradient Coherence Guided Meta-Learning for Cross-Domain Emerging Topic Rumor Detection
